subcodes.first_line: O ye two who are steadfast in the Covenant! Blessed are ye, that ye have arisen to serve the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ثابت بر میثاق خوشا بحال شما که قیام بر خدمت امرالله نموده اید از این
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the golden rule; regard for one's neighbor; doing unto others, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @firmness in the Covenant
